StmtSimple.StatementText: SELECT VendorCode, VendorName, ItemsTotal, VendorTotal, POBelowMinimum FROM vw_ReqTotalsByVendor WHERE RequisitionId = 60158736

ScalarOperator.ScalarString: CASE WHEN [EDS].[dbo].[Vendors].[Code] IS NOT NULL THEN [EDS].[dbo].[Vendors].[Code] ELSE '' END

isnull(CASE WHEN [Expr1025] IS NULL OR [Expr1026] IS NULL THEN ($0.0000) ELSE CASE WHEN CASE WHEN [EDS].[dbo].[Approvals].[ApprovalDate] IS NOT NULL THEN [EDS].[dbo].[Approvals].[ApprovalDate] ELSE getdate() END>=[Expr1025] AND CASE WHEN [EDS].[dbo].[Approvals].[ApprovalDate] IS NOT NULL THEN [EDS].[dbo].[Approvals].[ApprovalDate] ELSE getdate() END<=[Expr1026] THEN ($0.0000) ELSE CASE WHEN getdate()<[Expr1026] AND isnull([EDS].[dbo].[Requisitions].[OrderType],(1))=(1) THEN ($0.0000) ELSE CASE WHEN [Expr1036]<[Expr1027] THEN [Expr1028] ELSE ($0.0000) END END END END,($0.0000))
isnull(CASE WHEN [Expr1063]=(0) THEN isnull([EDS].[dbo].[DistrictVendor].[Value],'') ELSE isnull([EDS].[dbo].[Vendors].[Code],'') END,'')

isnull(CASE WHEN isnull(rtrim([Expr1024]),'')='' THEN '' ELSE isnull(rtrim(ltrim([Expr1024])),'')+' '+' ' END+CASE WHEN isnull(rtrim([Expr1029]),'')='' THEN 'Bid Date: '+isnull(CONVERT(varchar(16),[Expr1023],101),'') ELSE 'Bid Number: '+isnull(rtrim([Expr1029]),'') END,'')

CASE WHEN [EDS].[dbo].[Vendors].[DisplayAs] IS NOT NULL THEN [EDS].[dbo].[Vendors].[DisplayAs] ELSE CASE WHEN [EDS].[dbo].[Vendors].[Name] IS NOT NULL THEN [EDS].[dbo].[Vendors].[Name] ELSE '' END END

CASE WHEN [EDS].[dbo].[Detail].[BidItemId] IS NULL THEN CASE WHEN isnull([EDS].[dbo].[Detail].[BidHeaderId],(0))=(0) THEN isnull([EDS].[dbo].[Requisitions].[BidHeaderId],(0)) ELSE [EDS].[dbo].[Detail].[BidHeaderId] END ELSE [Expr1017] END

CASE WHEN [EDS].[dbo].[Detail].[BidItemId] IS NULL THEN CASE WHEN isnull([EDS].[dbo].[Detail].[BidHeaderId],(0))=(0) THEN isnull([EDS].[dbo].[Requisitions].[BidHeaderId],(0)) ELSE [EDS].[dbo].[Detail].[BidHeaderId] END ELSE [Expr1017] END
CASE WHEN [Expr1067]=(0) THEN NULL ELSE [Expr1068] END

COUNT_BIG(CONVERT_IMPLICIT(decimal(19,4),[Expr1036]+isnull(CASE WHEN [Expr1025] IS NULL OR [Expr1026] IS NULL THEN ($0.0000) ELSE CASE WHEN CASE WHEN [EDS].[dbo].[Approvals].[ApprovalDate] IS NOT NULL THEN [EDS].[dbo].[Approvals].[ApprovalDate] ELSE getdate() END>=[Expr1025] AND CASE WHEN [EDS].[dbo].[Approvals].[ApprovalDate] IS NOT NULL THEN [EDS].[dbo].[Approvals].[ApprovalDate] ELSE getdate() END<=[Expr1026] THEN ($0.0000) ELSE CASE WHEN getdate()<[Expr1026] AND isnull([EDS].[dbo].[Requisitions].[OrderType],(1))=(1) THEN ($0.0000) ELSE CASE WHEN [Expr1036]<[Expr1027] THEN [Expr1028] ELSE ($0.0000) END END END END,($0.0000)),0)+[Expr1038])

SUM(CONVERT_IMPLICIT(decimal(19,4),[Expr1036]+isnull(CASE WHEN [Expr1025] IS NULL OR [Expr1026] IS NULL THEN ($0.0000) ELSE CASE WHEN CASE WHEN [EDS].[dbo].[Approvals].[ApprovalDate] IS NOT NULL THEN [EDS].[dbo].[Approvals].[ApprovalDate] ELSE getdate() END>=[Expr1025] AND CASE WHEN [EDS].[dbo].[Approvals].[ApprovalDate] IS NOT NULL THEN [EDS].[dbo].[Approvals].[ApprovalDate] ELSE getdate() END<=[Expr1026] THEN ($0.0000) ELSE CASE WHEN getdate()<[Expr1026] AND isnull([EDS].[dbo].[Requisitions].[OrderType],(1))=(1) THEN ($0.0000) ELSE CASE WHEN [Expr1036]<[Expr1027] THEN [Expr1028] ELSE ($0.0000) END END END END,($0.0000)),0)+[Expr1038])
